name: Bowmen
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — picks off the foe at range. Reskin of the Sniper; the Bolt die behaves like the Sniper die. figureCandidates from Mage Knight: Resurrection (minisgallery.com); pick any figure with a ranged attack on its dial — Resurrection has few dedicated archers, so role assignment is editorial.

specialAction.name: Aimed Bolt
specialAction.summary: Make an Attack on a valid target and add the Bolt die to the Attack dice. Its good faces add hits; on a misfire face you take Wounds (+2 or +1). The Bolt die re-rolls like the others but can never be modified.

effects.text: Add the Bolt die (Sniper-die analog) to the Attack pool.
Misfire faces add +2 or +1 Wound to the Bowmen.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, place 1 Hex token on the target after your Attack (weakening its Armor).

figureCandidates.name: Xandressan Windsman
figureCandidates.roleFit: Wind/skirmisher — best common stand-in for a ranged trooper.

figureCandidates.name: Skyguard Captain
figureCandidates.roleFit: Airborne strike from range; a stronger ranged option.

figureCandidates.name: Technoshocker
figureCandidates.roleFit: Ranged shock attacker, if you want a heavier shot.
